prompt: Create a vertical cinematic dark fantasy portrait of a pale white-haired sword maiden standing in a moonlit gothic forest or ruined temple at night. The composition is a tight upper-body close-up: the character faces forward with her head slightly lowered, long messy silver-white hair glowing in cold moonlight, wearing an ornate black lace gothic outfit with sheer embroidered sleeves, dark metallic floral ornaments, a black lace choker, and a spiked black crown-like hair accessory on one side. Her face is intentionally hidden by one opaque muted gray square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. She grips a vertical ornate longsword beside her face with one hand near the hilt at the upper left; the sword has a dark carved handle, an elaborate antique gold guard, and a luminous icy-blue blade covered in fine engraved filigree. Bright blue-white magical energy coils around the blade in swirling ribbons with sparks, particles, and mist. In the background, show exactly one full moon in the upper right, blurred dark trees and gothic silhouettes, drifting snow or dust motes, and deep blue-black atmospheric haze. Use high-detail photorealistic fantasy movie lighting, dramatic rim light on the hair, glowing sword illumination, shallow depth of field, high contrast, cold color grading, intricate textures, and no text or watermark. Aspect ratio 9:16.
